Web search for Mount Whitney altitude
Web search for NORAD IDs of SO-50, ISS (ZARYA), and AO-27
Checked GPredict package contents (usr/share/pixmaps/gpredict/maps/); 'mblue.png' does not exist.

privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for gpredict_env sota_high_altitude_expedition task by confirming the actual coordinates and elevation of Mount Whitney (36.5786 N, 118.292 W, 4421m) and the real NORAD IDs for SO-50, ISS, and AO-27. Discovered two critical flaws: first, the requested high-contrast map 'mblue.png' is completely hallucinated and does not exist in the GPredict package; second, the task is defective because 'verifier.py' is entirely missing from the environment, making the task unscorable.
